query: I forgot to submit the week 1 homework — I did all the questions and the learning-in-public post, but I missed filling the form. Is there any way I can submit week 1 homework now? I want to be on the leaderboard.
bot_answer: I couldn't find this in the course materials — please ask the instructors.
expected_answer: The platform does not accept late homework submissions once the form is closed. You'll still appear on the leaderboard with your next (week 2) homework.

query: I have my mid-semester exams these days, so I'm unable to keep up with Module 2 and complete the homework on time. Would it be okay to submit my homework after the deadline?
bot_answer: I couldn't find this in the course materials — please ask the instructors.
expected_answer: We don't offer individual deadline extensions, and once the homework form is closed it can't be submitted. Missing a homework won't affect your chances of getting the certificate.

query: Can you hand in the homework past the due date? And if not, are there consequences for getting a certificate?
bot_answer: Yes — homework is not mandatory for getting the certificate. You can miss a homework or hand it in late and still get the certificate as long as you pass the Capstone project.
expected_answer: Homework is not mandatory for the certificate (only passing the Capstone is), but you CANNOT submit homework after the form is closed — there are no late submissions.

query: How can I enroll into the live (cohort) course of LLM Zoomcamp? I just registered via email on the website but didn't see any option.
bot_answer: You don't need a separate enrollment step after registering by email; registration only gauges interest and you're accepted. To join the live cohort, follow the course announcements and join the live Q&A.
expected_answer: Registering by email is enough — there is no separate enrollment step. (Note: the live Q&A for this cohort has already happened.)

query: If we put our name in the certificate name field of the profile, would our name be displayed online, or sent to a third party, or used in any way?
bot_answer: Use your official name in the certificate name field if you want it on the certificate. I couldn't find any course note saying the certificate name is shown online or sent to third parties.
expected_answer: There are two name fields on purpose: the certificate name (your real name, printed on the certificate) and the leaderboard name (a nickname, anonymous by default). This lets people keep their real name off the public leaderboard while still getting it on the certificate.

query: I recently registered for this cohort of LLM Zoomcamp. How do I join and get the certificate?
bot_answer: You must finish with a live cohort and peer-review 3 capstone projects after submitting your own project.
expected_answer: For the certificate, you only need to finish a project. Homework is not required.
